label: Stat part (trainable)
description: Scales the stat based on whether the pawn has been trained in a specific trainable task.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

trainableDef.label: Trainable
trainableDef.description: TrainableDef that must be completed for this factor to apply.

factor.label: Factor
factor.description: Stat multiplier applied when the pawn has completed the trainable task.
